Pakistan_Companies_Act_2017.title: Powers of Board
Pakistan_Companies_Act_2017.description: The board requires shareholder resolution for significant transactions such as selling the undertaking of the company, or remitting a debt due by a director. High value undocumented cash transactions may violate the restrictions on board powers without shareholder consent.

Pakistan_Companies_Act_2017.title: Investments in Associated Companies
Pakistan_Companies_Act_2017.description: A company shall not make any investment in any of its associated companies or associated undertakings except under the authority of a special resolution. Unexpected transfers to related parties or unrecorded associated entities may violate this.

Pakistan_Companies_Act_2017.title: Financial statements
Pakistan_Companies_Act_2017.description: Requires companies to prepare true and fair financial statements. Anomalies such as missing liabilities, double billings, or valuation errors inherently violate the preparation of accurate financial statements.
